name: ZeroMimic
license: arXiv listing CC BY 4.0; code/checkpoint license not separately stated
suitability: descriptive-only: distills EPIC-KITCHENS video into deployable policies, no language corpus
focus_en: Distills image-goal-conditioned manipulation skills (open, close, pour, pick-place, cut, stir) from EPIC-KITCHENS human video for zero-shot robot deployment.
focus_cn: 从 EPIC-KITCHENS 人类视频中蒸馏出图像目标条件的操作技能（开、关、倒、抓放、切、搅拌），用于零样本机器人部署。
datapath_en: ZeroMimic consumes EPIC-KITCHENS egocentric kitchen video, using hand-pose estimation (HaMeR) and structure-from-motion to recover 3D wrist trajectories and camera geometry from shaky in-the-wild footage. It distills these into image-goal-conditioned skill policies for common manipulation categories (open, close, pour, pick-place, cut, stir) that deploy zero-shot on real robot arms. It releases the policies and checkpoints, not a language corpus.
datapath_cn: ZeroMimic 使用 EPIC-KITCHENS 第一人称厨房视频，借助手部姿态估计（HaMeR）与运动恢复结构，从抖动的真实场景画面中恢复 3D 腕部轨迹与相机几何。它将这些蒸馏为图像目标条件的技能策略，覆盖常见操作类别（开、关、倒、抓放、切、搅拌），可在真实机器人臂上零样本部署。它发布的是策略与检查点，而非语言语料。
flow_cn: 手部姿态（HaMeR） + 运动恢复结构
图像目标条件技能策略
零样本机器人部署（Franka / WidowX）
no_corpus_en: ZeroMimic is a skill-distillation method, not an annotation source. It consumes EPIC-KITCHENS video (which carries the EPIC license) and releases deployable policies, not text. There are no ZeroMimic-original language strings to download or cluster.
no_corpus_cn: ZeroMimic 是一种技能蒸馏方法，而非标注来源。它消费 EPIC-KITCHENS 视频（受 EPIC 许可约束），并发布可部署的策略而非文本。没有 ZeroMimic 原创的语言字符串可供下载或聚类。
example_caption_en: ZeroMimic distills manipulation skills from EPIC-KITCHENS egocentric video; the project page and demo video show hand-trajectory extraction and robot rollouts.
example_caption_cn: ZeroMimic 从 EPIC-KITCHENS 第一人称视频中蒸馏操作技能；项目主页与演示视频展示了手部轨迹提取与机器人执行。
provenance: Verified via arXiv 2503.23877, zeromimic.github.io, and github.com/junyaoshi/ZeroMimic.
citation: Shi et al., ZeroMimic: Distilling Robotic Manipulation Skills from Web Videos, ICRA 2025 (arXiv:2503.23877).
